pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler configuration to target Java 21 using the modern 'release' flag instead of separate source/target properties.
pom.xml.why_exists: The old 'maven.compiler.source/target' properties are deprecated in newer Maven compiler plugin versions and do not enforce cross-compilation as strictly as 'release'; using 'release' is required for correct JDK 21 compilation behavior in modern builds.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade JUnit Jupiter Engine dependency to a version compatible with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: JUnit 5.8.1 may have runtime compatibility issues or lack support for newer Java module structures/features present in JDK 21; upgrading ensures test execution stability.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove JUnit Jupiter API dependency as it is transitively provided by the Engine.
Upgrade Maven Surefire Plugin to a version that supports Java 21 test execution.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Surefire versions (like 2.22.2) often fail to launch or detect tests on JDK 21 due to internal API changes or module restrictions.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Maven Compiler Plugin with an explicit version compatible with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Ensures the build uses a compiler plugin version that fully supports the 'release' flag and JDK 21 features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Checkstyle plugin for code quality enforcement.
Add JaCoCo plugin for code coverage analysis.
Add Maven Site Plugin for project reporting.
Configure reporting section with various analysis plugins.
Add developer information to the POM.
Add project description to the POM.

src/main/java/stec/App.java.general_idea: Update Javadoc comment to include a trailing period for grammatical correctness.
Refactor main method to use a BacktrackingSudokuSolver instance and call solveGame instead of fillBoard.

src/main/java/stec/SudokuBoard.java.general_idea: Remove unused imports for Random, ArrayList, and List as the internal generation logic was removed.
src/main/java/stec/SudokuBoard.java.why_exists: Compiler error: unused imports or 'unused import' warnings treated as errors in stricter build configurations.

src/main/java/stec/SudokuBoard.java.general_idea: Add a field to hold a reference to the SudokuSolver strategy.
Change constructor to accept a SudokuSolver dependency instead of being parameterless.
src/main/java/stec/SudokuBoard.java.why_exists: Compiler error: constructor signature changed, callers must pass a solver instance.
